EXPLANATION: The paper is confirmed real and verified across multiple authoritative sources (ACM DL, Semantic Scholar, IR Anthology, Tampere University Research Portal), with authors Kalervo Järvelin and Jaana Kekäläinen. The author name mismatch in the cited reference ("Kek ̈al ̈ainen") is solely a LaTeX/Unicode encoding artifact of the special characters in "Kekäläinen," not a fabrication.
LINK: https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/582415.582418
FOUND_TITLE: Cumulated gain-based evaluation of IR techniques
FOUND_AUTHORS: Kalervo Järvelin, Jaana Kekäläinen
FOUND_YEAR: 2002
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
